command:
KEY="/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge"
SSH="ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -o BatchMode=yes -i $KEY"

echo '=== vm-backups (.192) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.192 'df -h / /mnt 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls /mnt/ 2>/dev/null; systemctl is-active nextcloud 2>/dev/null || docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null | head -5'

echo '=== vm-openclaw (.199) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.199 'df -h / 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ps aux | grep -E "openclaw|node" | grep -v grep | head -5; ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null; cat /home/jose/.config/openclaw/openclaw.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("model:",d.get("model","?"),"port:",d.get("port","?"))" 2>/dev/null'

echo '=== vm-hermes (.202) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.202 'df -h / 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ps aux | grep -E "hermes|python|node" | grep -v grep | head -5; systemctl --user is-active hermes 2>/dev/null || echo "user service check failed"; ls /home/jose/hermes/ 2>/dev/null | head -5'

echo '=== vm-ecosystem (.203) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.203 'df -h / 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null | head -10'

echo '=== vm-mcp-services (.204) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.204 'df -h / 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null | head -10'

echo '=== vm-memory (.205) ==='
$SSH jose@192.168.0.205 'df -h / 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime/ 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jose/moreno-tasks/ 2>/dev/null; cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json 2>/dev/null'

echo DONE_1897
